Collect, manage, and share testimonials: Collect, manage, and share testimonials with Senja.
To get your Senja API key:\n1. Log in to:
To get your Senja API key:
1. Log in to your Senja account.
2. Go to **Automate** in the left sidebar.
3. Click **REST API** and copy your API key.
Retrieve all testimonials from your Senj: Retrieve all testimonials from your Senja project.
Retrieve a specific testimonial by its I: Retrieve a specific testimonial by its ID.
Add a new testimonial to your Senja proj: Add a new testimonial to your Senja project.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint

Field used to sort the results.
Filter by approval status. Leave empty t: Filter by approval status. Leave empty to return all testimonials.

Filter testimonials by their source plat: Filter testimonials by their source platform (e.g. Google, Twitter).
Filter testimonials that have all of the: Filter testimonials that have all of the specified tags.
Filter by language using an ISO 639 code: Filter by language using an ISO 639 code (e.g. "en", "fr", "de").
Maximum number of testimonials to return: Maximum number of testimonials to return (1–1000).
Page number for pagination. Start at 1.
The unique ID of the testimonial. You ca: The unique ID of the testimonial. You can find it in the URL when viewing a testimonial in Senja, or from the output of a "List Testimonials" step.
Choose \"Text\" for a written testimonia: Choose "Text" for a written testimonial or "Video" for a video testimonial.
Full name of the person giving the testi: Full name of the person giving the testimonial.
A short headline for the testimonial.
The body of the testimonial. Required fo: The body of the testimonial. Required for text testimonials.
Check to mark the testimonial as approve: Check to mark the testimonial as approved immediately. Leave unchecked to keep it pending.
Date the testimonial was given. Leave em: Date the testimonial was given. Leave empty to use today's date.
Link to the original testimonial (e.g. a: Link to the original testimonial (e.g. a tweet URL, Google review link).
URL of the video testimonial. Required w: URL of the video testimonial. Required when Testimonial Type is "Video".
Company or organisation the customer bel: Company or organisation the customer belongs to.
Short role or tagline for the customer (: Short role or tagline for the customer (e.g. "CEO at Acme").
Social media handle or username of the c: Social media handle or username of the customer (e.g. "@johndoe").

Direct URL to the customer's profile pic: Direct URL to the customer's profile picture.
Direct URL to the customer's company log: Direct URL to the customer's company logo.
The platform where this testimonial orig: The platform where this testimonial originally came from.
Tags to attach to this testimonial for o: Tags to attach to this testimonial for organisation and filtering.
URL of the thumbnail image for this test: URL of the thumbnail image for this testimonial.
ID of the Senja form to associate this t: ID of the Senja form to associate this testimonial with.

## Setup Instructions\n\n1. In Senja, go:
## Setup Instructions

1. In Senja, go to **Automate** in the left sidebar and scroll down to the Webhooks section.
2. Click **Create webhook**.
3. Paste the following URL into the webhook URL field:
```text
{{webhookUrl}}
```
4. Select the events you want to receive and click **Save**.
Only trigger for the selected event type: Only trigger for the selected event types. Leave empty to trigger on all events. Make sure the matching events are enabled in Senja.
